news.news: Gilead Sciences received all required regulatory approvals for its acquisition of Arcellx, a company developing anitocabtagene autoleucel (anito-cel), a gene-edited CAR-T cell therapy. The tender offer for Arcellx shares has been extended to April 27, 2026, with a purchase price of $115.00 per share plus a contingent value right.

UCB announced a definitive agreement to acquire Neurona Therapeutics for an upfront payment of $650 million and up to $500 million in milestones. The deal includes NRTX-1001, a regenerative pluripotent stem cell therapy currently in Phase I/II trials for drug-resistant mesial temporal lobe epilepsy, which utilizes cell engineering to restore neural circuitry.
